case_title: KEVIN MEE ET AL VS. JOE TOBONI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 SERVED DEC-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TOBONI, JOE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEE, KEVIN GLEICHAUF, WYATT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOBONI, JOE $6,180.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,180.00 FILED BY MEE, KEVIN GLEICHAUF, WYATT AS TO DEFENDANT TOBONI, JOE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-17-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-17-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS KEVIN MEE AND WYATT GLEICHAUF ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOE TOBONI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-17-2017 - JUDGMENT.
